song_name: Do That To Me One More Time
version_description: New version for piano and bass. All accurate chords with the right bass notes (often slashed). Based on YouTube link: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=033b90AnkKg.

versions.song_name: Do That To Me One More Time
Do That To Me One More Time
versions.version_description: 1980 US number one try playing as very slow bossa nova.

tuning: E A D G B E

content:
Captain & Tennille - Do That To Me One More Time (1979)

YouTube link: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=033b90AnkKg

[Intro]
[tab]  [ch]C[/ch]             [ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]C/F[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]        [ch]F/G[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]F/G[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
| •  •  •  •  | •  •  •  •  | •  •      •   •  |  •    •   •    •  |[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]C[/ch]             [ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]C/F[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]        [ch]F/G[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]F/G[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
| •  •  •  •  | •  •  •  •  | •  •      •   •  |  •    •   •    •  |[/tab]

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]C2[/ch]                      [ch]Am[/ch]
Do that to me one more time[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]F2[/ch]                   [ch]F/G[/ch]
Once is never enough with a man like you[/tab]
[tab][ch]C2[/ch]                      [ch]Am[/ch]
Do that to me one more time[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]F2[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]E/G#[/ch]
I can never get enough of a man like you, oh[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Amadd9[/ch]    [ch]Abaug[/ch]       [ch]Am/G[/ch]       [ch]D/F#[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]
  Kiss... me,  like you just did...[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]F/G[/ch]     [ch]F/G[/ch]     N.C.
Oh baby..., do that to me once again[/tab]

[Interlude]
[tab]  [ch]C[/ch]             [ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]C/F[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]        [ch]F/G[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]F/G[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
| •  •  •  •  | •  •  •  •  | •  •      •   •  |  •    •   •    •  |[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]C2[/ch]                        [ch]Am[/ch]
Pass that by me one more time[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]F2[/ch]                   [ch]F/G[/ch]
Once just isn't enough for my heart to hear[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C2[/ch]                      [ch]Am[/ch]
Whoa, tell it to me one more time[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]F2[/ch]                    [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]E/G#[/ch]
I can never hear enough while I got ya near, oh[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Amadd9[/ch]      [ch]Abaug[/ch]             [ch]Am/G[/ch]         [ch]D/F#[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]
  Say those words again, like you just did...[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]F/G[/ch]     [ch]F/G[/ch]  N.C.             [ch]Am9[/ch]    [ch]C/D[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]
Oh baby..., tell it to me once again...[/tab]

[Lyricon/Synth Solo]
[tab]  [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]Em[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]             [ch]C/D[/ch]
| •  •  •  •  | •  •  •  •  | •  •  •  •  | •  •  •  •  |[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]Em[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]B/D#[/ch]
| •  •  •  •  | •  •  •  •  | •  •  •  •  | •  •  •  •  |[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Em[/ch]            [ch]D#aug[/ch]         [ch]G/D[/ch]           [ch]A/C#[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
| •  •  •  •  | •  •  •  •  | •  •  •  •  | •  •  •  •  |[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]C/D[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]Em[/ch]            [ch]G/A[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]
| •  •  •  •  | •  •  •  •  | •  •  •  •  | •  •  •  •  |[/tab]

[Verse 3]
[tab][ch]D2[/ch]                      [ch]Bm7[/ch]
Do that to me one more time[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]G2[/ch]                    [ch]G/A[/ch]
Once is never enough with a man like you[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]D2[/ch]                      [ch]Bm7[/ch]
Whoa, do that to me one more time[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]G2[/ch]                   [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]F#7/A#[/ch]
I can never get enough of a man like you, oh[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Bmadd9[/ch]    [ch]Bbaug[/ch]     [ch]D/A[/ch]          [ch]E/G#[/ch]   [ch]E[/ch]
  Kiss... me,  like you just did...[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]G/A[/ch]      [ch]G/A[/ch]     N.C.         [ch]Dmaj9[/ch]     [ch]Bm7[/ch]
Oh baby..., do that to me once again...[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Em7[/ch]      [ch]G/A[/ch]     N.C.             [ch]Dmaj9[/ch]    [ch]Bm7[/ch]
Whoa baby..., do that to me once again[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Em7[/ch]      [ch]G/A[/ch]     N.C.            ([ch]Dmaj9[/ch])
Whoa baby..., do that to me one more time[/tab]

[Fading Outro]
[tab]  [ch]Dmaj9[/ch]         [ch]G/A[/ch]           [ch]Dmaj9[/ch]         [ch]G/A[/ch]
| •  •  •  •  | •  •  •  •  | •  •  •  •  | •  •  •  •  |    (8x)[/tab]
     (Do it again)  One more time  (Do it again)  One more time
